summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 Hospital Transfer Management System changes. All key features working: role renamed from 'jefe_turno' to 'coordinador', destinations without category field, admin vehicle edit/delete functionality, and proper UI role labels.

minor_issues.issue: Manager dashboard requires login as coordinador user, which needs approval flow
minor_issues.note: Not a blocking issue - authentication flow works correctly

passed_tests: Backend API: 100% success rate (34/34 tests passed)
Coordinador role registration, approval, and login flow
Admin vehicle management: create, edit, delete functionality
Coordinador role has proper access to management endpoints
Admin dashboard vehicle cards show edit/delete buttons
Destination forms only have name and address fields
User management dropdowns show correct role options
